h1: Fireplace Design Tips from HGTV’s Rock the Block
h2: 7 Fireplace Design Options that Perfectly Match Today's Decor Trends
4 Outdoor Fireplace Ideas Inspired by HGTV's Rock the Block

paragraphs: We always feel inspired after watching HGTV’s Rock the Block. With top interior designers renovating four builder-grade homes with their signature styles, there’s no shortage of fresh ideas for your Pinterest boards.
Our favorite part? The Heat & Glo fireplaces, of course. Here’s a walk-through of each team’s living room designs and takeaways that you can use for your own home.

This serene living room retreat looks straight out of Architectural Digest. From the coffered ceiling to the sculptural 6K/8K Series gas fireplace with hand-painted birch logs, you can see how textures play an important role in adding depth and dimension to a space.Tip: Maximize Your Living Space by Creating a Multifunctional FireplaceWith bench seating and a clever storage nook, Keith and Evan show how your fireplace can be more than a source of warmth.

A coastal-style home doesn't require hanging seashells or nautical-themed decorations on every wall to fit the vibe. Take a page from Leslie & Lyndsay with this vibrant and cozy living room that’s anchored by a traditional, minimalist 6K/8K Series gas fireplace “I feel like a fireplace is just a good central grounding focal point,” Lyndsay said.Tip: Pair Bold Decor with a Minimalist Focal PointIn a bold, tropical-style space, choosing a clean and modern-looking fireplace can help keep the design balanced.

Paige and Mitch created a focal point for their room with a sleek gas fireplace and concrete surround. While some questioned the need for this design element, Eric Sizemore of A PLUS Fireplace, Port Richey Florida, says they made an excellent choice.“The Primo ll is the perfect Florida fireplace. PowerFlow II venting technology redirects the heat outside, so you can enjoy the ambiance every day of the year.”Tip: No-Heat Fireplaces Enhance Your Design FlexibilityThanks to automatic heat control, you can hang heat-sensitive materials like a TV or artwork just inches above your fireplace, without the need for a mantel.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The Modern version of 6K/8K Series—the best-selling gas fireplace in its category—fits your vibe with clean look in a class by itself. A bigger view, trend-forward design, voice control and heat management are at home in any décor.
Discover how the right fireplace front can elevate any design style, from modern farmhouse to transitional.
Winning combinations of living room design and how a fireplace factors in.
Unleash the potential of your outdoor space with these fireplace ideas from HGTV home designers.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
